skill.name: documentation
skill.description: Guides assistants to create clear, structured Markdown documents and save long-form output to files.
skill.summary: Create readable Markdown documents with practical structure, tone, and file output guidance.
skill.author: BfdCampos

security_audit.summary: AI review found the static findings are false positives. The backtick findings at SKILL.md:12 and SKILL.md:26 are Markdown inline-code formatting, the weak cryptography alerts at SKILL.md:3 match ordinary descriptive text, and the system reconnaissance alert at SKILL.md:22 refers to document formatting guidance. No evidence found of command execution, weak cryptographic use, reconnaissance behavior, prompt injection, data exfiltration, or malicious intent.

content.value_statement: Long-form AI output can become hard to scan, reuse, or maintain. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code to create structured Markdown files for plans, guides, notes, and specifications.
actual_capabilities: Directs long-form document output into Markdown files instead of terminal-only responses.
Applies headers, bullets, lists, tables, and short paragraphs for readable structure.
Guides tone choices for technical docs, proposals, brainstorms, and plans.
Recommends Mermaid diagrams when architecture, flows, or relationships need visuals.
Provides naming guidance for document files, including optional timestamps when useful.
limitations: Does not include templates for specific industries or compliance standards.
Does not validate facts, citations, or external references on its own.
Does not provide automated publishing, versioning, or documentation site generation.
Diagram support depends on a separate Mermaid skill being available.

use_cases.title: Prepare Engineering Plans
use_cases.description: Create concise implementation plans with sections, action items, and readable Markdown formatting.

use_cases.title: Draft Product Proposals
use_cases.description: Turn product ideas into persuasive but honest proposal documents with clear structure.

use_cases.title: Organize Research Notes
use_cases.description: Capture exploratory notes, brainstorms, and decisions in a file that is easy to revisit.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Basic Guide
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a simple Markdown document.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Markdown guide for [topic]. Save it to a sensible file name and include clear sections, short paragraphs, and useful bullet lists.

prompt_templates.title: Write a Project Plan
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate request for an actionable planning document.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write an implementation plan for [project]. Include goals, assumptions, milestones, risks, and next steps. Save the plan as a Markdown file.

prompt_templates.title: Document a Technical Design
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for architecture or system documentation.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a technical design document for [system]. Cover context, architecture, data flow, tradeoffs, operational concerns, and open questions. Add a diagram section if useful.

prompt_templates.title: Transform Notes into Documentation
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request that requires synthesis and editorial structure.
prompt_templates.prompt: Convert these rough notes into polished documentation: [notes]. Preserve important details, organize the content logically, and save the result as a Markdown file.

output_examples.input: Create a README for a small CLI tool.
output_examples.output: A Markdown README file with overview, installation, usage, configuration, troubleshooting, and contribution sections.

output_examples.input: Write a proposal for improving onboarding.
output_examples.output: A structured proposal document with problem statement, goals, recommended changes, risks, timeline, and success measures.

output_examples.input: Turn meeting notes into a plan.
output_examples.output: A saved planning document with decisions, action items, owners, deadlines, risks, and follow-up questions.

best_practices: State the document type, audience, and desired level of detail in the prompt.
Ask for diagrams only when relationships or flows would be clearer visually.
Review generated files for factual accuracy before sharing or publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for short answers that do not need a saved file.
Do not rely on the skill to verify facts, links, or citations automatically.
Do not request excessive emoji use in formal or technical documents.

faq.question: What does this skill help create?
faq.answer: It helps create Markdown documents such as plans, proposals, guides, notes, specifications, designs, and READMEs.

faq.question: Does it always save output to a file?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill instructs the assistant to save long-form document output to a Markdown file.

faq.question: Can it create diagrams?
faq.answer: It can recommend Mermaid diagrams when useful, but diagram creation depends on a separate Mermaid skill.

faq.question: Is it suitable for technical documentation?
faq.answer: Yes. It emphasizes clear structure, direct tone, code blocks for commands, and readable Markdown formatting.

faq.question: Does it check facts or sources?
faq.answer: No. It improves document structure and presentation, but users should verify facts, citations, and external references.

faq.question: Which AI tools does it support?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
